info.name: Digital Products Platform
info.description: Complete API collection for the Digital Products Platform. Import into Postman and set the environment variables to get started.

request.description: No auth required. Returns server status and environment.
Opens Google login page. Not testable via Postman directly — use browser.

item.name: Place Order — Number Out of Range (Negative)
Get My Orders — Filter by Status

exec: pm.test('Status ACTIVE', () => { const j = pm.response.json(); if (j.data?.user) pm.expect(j.data.user.status).to.eql('ACTIVE'); });

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Test Product 1773285997535",
  "basePrice": 9.99,
  "minQty": 1,
  "maxQty": 10,
  "description": "Test product with dynamic fields",
  "category": "games",
  "executionType": "automatic",
  "isActive": true,
  "orderFields": [
    {
      "id": "f1",
      "key": "player_id",
      "label": "Player ID",
      "type": "text",
      "required": true,
      "isActive": true,
      "sortOrder": 1
    },
    {
      "id": "f2",
      "key": "server",
      "label": "Server Region",
      "type": "select",
      "options": [
        "NA",
        "EU",
        "AS",
        "ME"
      ],
      "required": true,
      "isActive": true,
      "sortOrder": 2
    },
    {
      "id": "f3",
      "key": "amount",
      "label": "Diamond Amount",
      "type": "number",
      "min": 100,
      "max": 10000,
      "required": true,
      "isActive": true,
      "sortOrder": 3
    },
    {
      "id": "f4",
      "key": "video_url",
      "label": "Profile URL",
      "type": "url",
      "required": false,
      "isActive": true,
      "sortOrder": 4
    }
  ],
  "providerMapping": {
    "player_id": "link",
    "server": "server_id",
    "amount": "quantity"
  }
}

request.description: Admin approves with a different amount than requested (e.g. after fee deduction).
